title: Sanji and Usopp Make Their Stand
description: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Nico Robin, Sanji, Nola. Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: There is still more to these ruins.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: Phew! That snake is really irritating!!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Hey, you should watch out around there.

summary: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
